# User Story: INTG-003

**Epic:** EPIC-005
**Title:** Invoice Generation & Email Delivery
**ID:** INTG-003
**Status:** Draft
**Phase:** 2

---

## User Story Statement

**As a** clinic staff
**I want** invoices to be auto-generated and sent to patients via email
**So that** payment records are clear and professional

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Invoice PDF generated on appointment completion
- [ ] Invoice includes: patient name, service, amount, date, clinic details
- [ ] Email sent automatically with invoice attachment
- [ ] Invoice stored in audit log
- [ ] Email template customizable by clinic
- [ ] Resend invoice endpoint available
- [ ] Invoice number unique and sequential

---

## Technical Requirements

**Backend:**
- PDF generation: `html2pdf` or Puppeteer
- Endpoint: `POST /api/invoices/generate`
- Email sending: SendGrid or AWS SES
- Store invoice path in audit_log
- Invoice number sequence in clinic settings

**Frontend:**
- Invoice preview in patient dashboard
- Download PDF button

**Testing:**
- Unit: Invoice generation, email sending
- Integration: E2E appointment → invoice flow

---

## Dependencies

**Previous Stories:** INTG-001, INTG-002
**Blocks:** INTG-004 (refunds), INTG-006 (reporting)

---

## Estimation & Priority

**Story Points:** 8
**Priority:** HIGH
**Time Estimate:** 5 hours

---

## Status

Draft
